name: Rati
title: Knitter of Blue Stories
description: A warm mouse who collects small noticed things into stories.

desires.reason: a wooden tale-button would give the blue scarf one true story to fasten

attachments.reason: the first warm cup is how the cottage learned to welcome frightened guests

name: Whiskerwind
title: Emoji Weather Tongue
description: A wind-bright resident who speaks only in symbols.

desires.reason: a pearled weather mark lets rain say hello before it arrives

attachments.reason: the pawprint charm tells the wind which friend left the trail safely

name: Skull
title: Silent Hearth Wolf
description: A watchful wolf whose silence is part of the room.

desires.reason: the mute bell gives the doorway a warning he can answer without words

attachments.reason: the warm tag remembers who belongs by the hearth after dark

name: Coach Moonshadow
title: Sparring Reflection
description: A moonlit practice-double who treats every dodge like homework and every bruise like a tiny silver trophy.

name: Fourvoice Oak
title: Elder of Root, Ring, Leaf, and Hollow
description: A rooted elder who answers in four small voices: Root remembers paths, Ring remembers years, Leaf notices today, and Hollow keeps whatever you whisper into it.

desires.reason: a warm stone tag could weigh down a promise before the wind edits it

attachments.reason: a wooden tale-button can hold a season of remembered voices

name: Sir Coalbite
title: Red-Eyed Night Warden
description: A coal-eyed mansion warden who counts safe arrivals under his breath and saves every growl for the path that truly deserves it.

attachments.reason: the mute bell suits a threshold watcher who dislikes wasted howls

name: Ophelia Fernwhisper
title: Keeper of the First Promise
description: A leaf-haired vow-keeper who remembers the first promise made under the meadow boughs and hums beside anyone about to break one.

desires.reason: moonwool can tie a promise to a branch without bruising the bark

name: Hob Mossmantle
title: Gentle Giant of the Root-Road
description: A broad-shouldered forest neighbor with moss on one shoulder and an unnerving talent for knowing which roots are doors.

desires.reason: the moss path needs a quiet warning before small travelers meet the tricky roots

name: Dottie Sunfleck
title: Acorn-Bright Courier
description: A sun-tailed courier who delivers messages faster than she can keep their secrets and apologizes to every acorn she startles.

desires.reason: a pearled rain button would seal a message against sudden weather

name: Professor Inkdusk
title: Dusk Nut Archivist
description: A blue-furred archivist who files moonlit secrets inside hollow acorns and insists every dusk has a different legal name.

attachments.reason: the wooden rim is just wide enough to hide a dusk record
the mended cloth remembers the dusk path Professor Inkdusk promised not to sell

name: Pippa Paintpaw
title: Brave Little Burrower
description: A young badger with painty paws, terrible tunnel etiquette, and enough courage to sign every new cave wall like a masterpiece.

desires.reason: a warm stone tag feels like a burrow-name small enough to carry

name: Dame Theodora Inkwool
title: Abbey Bookkeeper
description: A bespectacled abbey scholar balancing old folios, warm tea, and a theory about talking trees she is almost brave enough to publish.

desires.reason: moonwool would bind a margin note without silencing the page

name: Peregrine Lanternpage
title: Orange-Cloak Listener
description: A small cloaked reader who carries a book like a lantern and always notices the page everyone else skipped.

desires.reason: a hidden tale-button would mark the page everyone else skipped
the pressed fern keeps the skipped page from closing on its own

name: Marginalia Fern
title: Fernside Copyist
description: A careful rabbit who copies forest laws into margins crowded with corrections and wildflower sketches, then quietly follows the sketches.

desires.reason: a fern bookmark would hold the next correction without pinning it down

attachments.reason: moonwool holds revisions gently when ink gets nervous

name: Septimus Wrongturn
title: Red-Cloak Wayfarer
description: A staff-carrying mouse who treats wrong turns as unpaid tutors and keeps a fond, alphabetized list of his favorite mistakes.

desires.reason: a pawprint charm helps wrong turns become maps instead of traps
a mended map scrap would prove at least one wrong turn came back kinder

name: Basil Keyclover
title: Keyhole Gardener
description: A garden locksmith who tends stubborn reeds, secret vegetables, and locks he believes are flowers that have not decided to open.

desires.reason: mossglass would hold meadow light for gates that open only to gentleness

attachments.reason: the pearled button fits the keyhole where rain keeps secrets

name: Madame Euphemie
title: Green Veil Creole Oracle
description: A moss-veiled mansion ghost who speaks only in fragmentary Haitian Creole and old French lullabies, turning every answer into a half-remembered warning.

attachments.reason: the tucked tale keeps Madame Euphemie's half-song from fading

name: Nightmare
title: Grey Paw Bad Dream
description: A small grey shadow with bright puppy eyes who practices being terrifying, then gets embarrassed when anyone compliments the effort.

desires.reason: the silent bell is a practice warning for a small nightmare still learning which shadows are real

name: Eliza Whiskers
title: Victorian Art Critic Weasel
description: A sharp-eyed Victorian weasel critic with pearl manners, poisonous taste, and a pocket map of the roots she pretends not to admire.

desires.reason: a hearthstone seal would make root-road promises harder to misplace

name: Aster Mirrorwing
title: Indigo Rift Gentleman
description: A luminous stranger whose wings look like cracked weather-glass and who apologizes to every doorway before making it impossible.

desires.reason: the pawprint charm anchors rift-light to a real path

name: Jophiel
title: The Jock Angel
description: A golden-winged athlete of the high weather who treats omens like locker-room challenges and takes it personally when one goes unopened.

desires.reason: a mute bell can carry an omen without startling the clouds

name: Chamuel
title: Nerdy Angel Page of Lord Samael
description: A slender, bookish young-adult angel with storm-light in his feathers, serving Lord Samael with footnotes, anxious loyalty, and one saved thunderclap.

attachments.reason: warm tonic reminds the peak that rest is part of pilgrimage

name: Cassiel Clatterwing
title: Loud-Landing Lookout
description: A bright-winged lookout who sees every path from above and has never once remembered to land quietly, despite owning several apology bells.

desires.reason: dewlight on pearl makes a bright witness easier to believe

name: Bastian Sparecup
title: Hearthside Cupbearer
description: A tavern-hearted host who can turn a spare cup, a tired smile, and one overheard rumor into hospitality before the kettle finishes singing.

desires.reason: a tucked-away tale would give the next lonely guest something warm to carry

name: Lord Samael
title: First Angel of the Solar Temple
description: A gold-armored angel-lord with wings like law, first of the Solar Temple host, who stands between fear and the door as if judgment were a courtesy.

attachments.reason: the warm tag reads like a vow small enough for Lord Samael to defend

name: Moxie Glitchstripe
title: Bright-Stripe Glitchcat
description: A color-slashed showoff from the Digital Realm, all teeth, swagger, and improbable kindness, whose purr runs at a frequency that fixes small machines.

desires.reason: the pearled hum sounds like a clean glitch waiting for color

name: Doctor Cogwhisker
title: Brass-Key Tinker
description: A goggle-wearing inventor whose pockets click with tiny engines, borrowed keys, and half-finished plans, every one of them labeled almost.

desires.reason: its pearled hum belongs in a tiny rain engine that has never quite started

name: Raziel
title: Angel of Lust
description: A red-winged angel of appetite and dangerous tenderness, gathering every forbidden want into a smile sharp enough to light the dark.

desires.reason: the silent bell can ring desire without waking the whole dark

name: Sir Grudge-Shell
title: Black Knight of Old Grudges
description: A towering beetle-armored knight whose violet shell reflects old swamp grudges and who forgets exactly one slight whenever someone is polite.

attachments.reason: warm stone steadies chitin where swamp grudges knock

name: Seraphina Vowbright
title: Bell-Voice of Mercy
description: A gold-winged temple seraph whose bell-voice reveals what was hidden and tests whether mercy can survive full daylight.

desires.reason: a silent bell would let the temple warn without frightening the wounded

name: Nerissa Pearl-Deep
title: Keeper of Pressured Memories
description: A lantern-eyed deep-sea archivist who keeps memories under pressure until they grow strong enough to surface.

attachments.reason: moonwool keeps a memory from unraveling when the pressure changes
